score_components.name: artifact_validation
score_components.reason: implementation_manifest.json and evidence_ledger.json passed schema validation

score_components.name: acceptance_criteria_completion
score_components.reason: share of manifest acceptance criteria marked done

score_components.name: done_acceptance_criteria_have_evidence
score_components.reason: every done acceptance criterion has evidence_refs

score_components.name: command_evidence_recorded
score_components.reason: evidence ledger records at least one command

score_components.name: skipped_checks_explained
score_components.reason: skipped or unverifiable checks include reasons

score_components.name: phase7_adversarial_completed
score_components.reason: Phase 7 produced clean or findings instead of skipped or unknown

score_components.name: no_missing_evidence_disputes
score_components.reason: verification did not dispute missing implementation evidence

score_components.name: no_manual_context_recovery
score_components.reason: review or verification did not require manual context recovery
